scripts.migrate:all: bash -c 'for file in src/db/migration_*.sql; do echo "Running: $file"; wrangler d1 execute caiwu-db --remote --file="$file" || echo "Failed or already applied: $file"; done'
scripts.migrate:remote: bash -c 'for file in src/db/migration_*.sql; do echo "Running: $file"; wrangler d1 execute caiwu-db --remote --file="$file" || echo "Failed or already applied: $file"; done'
